metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_309
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Using two specific antibodies and STED microscopy, it is shown that RIMBP localizes to active zones in drosophila NMJ. RIMBP tightly colocalizes with Bruchpilot, a well established marker for the active zone (Figure 1). Figure 2 provides two knockout controls for the c-terminal antibody.

Due to the high sequence homology between fly RIMBP and mammalian RIMBP1 & 2, and based on the fact that mouse RIMBP2 is localized at the active zone (Grauel et.al. 2016), it is assumed that mouse RIMBP1 is also present at the active zone.. Experimental description: We generated antibodies against Drosophila RBP (DRBP) (epitopes in Fig. 1A), which stained presynapses at neuromuscular junctions (NMJs) (Fig. 1B, left).

12/4/2017 Pim:
- There are a number of RBP isoforms listed in Uniprot. I selected the accession of the longest isoform (A0A0B4JDC9).
